en: ♪ When she tosses her hair, they go perfectly still ♪
ko: 그녀가 머리를 던질 때, 모두 완전히 멈춘다

en: ♪ All their eyes say, don't attack me ♪
♪ Watch them sweat and pan and shake ♪
ko: 그들이 땀을 흘리고 헐떡이며 떨리는 모습을 지켜봐

en: ♪ Every food chain has its acne ♪
♪ She's the queen of beasts, she can smell your fear ♪
♪ In this biosphere, she's the apex predator ♪
♪ Like a lioness, only with less fur ♪
♪ Do not mess with her, she's the apex predator ♪
Absolutely not. ♪ At the watering hole, see the girls who weren't nice ♪
♪ Had to scatter like mice from a jungle pet ♪
♪ And though Janice is great, she does not have this power ♪
♪ People literally cower, Janice can do that ♪
